name: Reference Extravaganza
description: Supercharge Thymer references. Type [[ to reference any line of text inline (search, pick, insert). Set an alias on any reference, page or line, to change what its chip shows without recreating the link: the box pre-fills with the current title so you can trim it down. Inline Transclusion: expand a selected reference in place with Cmd/Ctrl+Down (Cmd/Ctrl+Up collapses) to see and edit what it points to, nested right under it. Commands: "Set alias for reference" (shortcut Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+A, rebindable in-app via "Set alias keyboard shortcut").
